sections.sectionTitle: Zofar in Migilote' Tuahtheih Thute Gen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Naamah gammi Zofar in dawng a
“Job aw, ka heh nong suaksak a, ka ki-ipzo nawn kei hi
Na thugente khempeuh kei nong simmawhna kampau vive hi a, ahi zongin kong dawn'na ding ka thei hi
Tanglai peka kipan, leitung mi a om cila kipanin
migilote' nopsak hun a tom mahmahna thu, Pasian a donlote' lungdam hun a tom mahmahna thu theilo na hi hiam
Migilopa lian mahmahin vantung a banto zongin, lian mahmahin a lutang in meii lak a banto zongin
leivui them bangin maimang veve lel ding hi. Amah a thei ngei mite in, ‘Amah koi-ah omta ahi hiam?’ ci-in lamdangsa ding uh hi
Amah pen zana mangmat bang, mumaang bangin maimang ding a, cikmah hunin kimukik ngei nawnlo ding hi
Ama ten'na ngei mun panin amah maimang ding a
mizawngte' na a suhsakte, a tate in lohsak ding uh hi
A pumpi moi suahin a thatang a hat mahmah hangin a sawtloin leivui a suakpak ding ahi hi
“Ama kam sungah gitlohna lim sa mahmahin, namtui mahmah sa-in, a leii tawh lop melmel a
amah in muammuam nuamin siakhia nuamlo a, lim sa mahmahin a dangtawng den'na-in a neih hangin
a gil sung a tun' ciangin a kha mahmah an suakin, gu a kha mahmahte zahin kha deidai hi
Migilopa in a guksa nate luakhia kik a, a gil sung nangawn panin Pasian in a lakkhiatsak hi
Migilopa' nekte pen gu tawh kibang a, gul guneite' tuk bangin amah a sisak hi
Amah in bawngnawi leh khuaizu gun tui bangin a luang mukha lo ding hi
Amah in a nasep thamante nusia ding a, a hauhna khempeuh zangkha manlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mizawngte bawlsia-in donlo a, midangte' inn lamsate sutin a tang hi
“A huaihamna bei ngeilo a, a duh khempeuh sit neilo hi
Amah in a nek ciangin a khamval cih om ngeilo a, tu-in a hauhna khempeuh a beimang khinta ahi hi
A cihtheih pen hun laitakin lungkhamna lianpen a tuak hi
Amah in a duhduh ne mai hen! Pasian in hehna tawh amah gim pia ngawn ding hi
Amah in namsau pelhin a taina-ah sumngo thal in kaptuk ding hi
Thaltang khat in ama pumpi pailet a, a te-dildel thaltang mukah si taak keuhkeuh a, ama tungah a kihtakhuai hong tung hi
A kholsa khempeuh kisusia a, mihing' tawhloh meikuang in amah leh a innkuan khempeuh a kangtum hi
Vantungte in hih mipa' mawhna pholak uh a, leitung in ama langah teci a pang hi
Pasian' hehna hangin ama hauhna khempeuh a kisusiamang ding ahi hi
“Migilote' ngah dingin Pasian in a piak gimna migilote' ngah pen tu-a bang ahi hi,” a ci hi.
